response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the experience requirement with nearly two decades of full-stack development, deep TypeScript/Node.js/React experience in production, current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work, and strong craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development). Cloud (AWS CDK), Docker, Kubernetes, MongoDB, and Git are all covered. The main gaps are the absence of Nest.js, Kotlin, and explicit Vitest/Playwright experience, but these are readily learnable given the demonstrated breadth across languages and platforms.
strengths: Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across multiple production companies
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience, directly matching a rare requirement
Strong engineering culture fit: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, testing workshops, and open-source maintainership
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the primary stack
Kotlin and Python are not in the skill set; Java exposure appears dated
Testing tools named are not Vitest/Jest/Playwright specifically, though TDD depth suggests fast ramp-up
